meta.title: Housing Research Organizations — Reference Index
meta.purpose: Curated index of authoritative housing research, policy, and data orgs commonly cited in LIHTC IC memos, policy briefs, and grant applications. Use this as a starter set when sourcing claims about housing supply, affordability, policy, or financial markets.

orgs.name: Novogradac & Company LLP
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: The authoritative source for LIHTC equity pricing benchmarks. Every cap-stack assumes Novogradac numbers, explicitly or implicitly.

orgs.name: National Low Income Housing Coalition (NLIHC)
orgs.category: Affordable housing policy + cost burden data
publications: Out of Reach (annual housing wage report)
The Gap (annual shortage of affordable + available units)
orgs.frequency: Out of Reach annual (June); Advocates' Guide annual
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Out of Reach housing wage by state/MSA/county is the single best metric for 'why does this jurisdiction need affordable housing?' in IC memos.

orgs.name: Harvard Joint Center for Housing Studies (JCHS)
publications: The State of the Nation's Housing (annual flagship)
The State of the Renters Housing
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: The reference national benchmark. Cited in nearly every federal housing policy brief and major foundation grant application.

orgs.name: Yardi Matrix
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Free monthly rent growth + occupancy by metro. Industry-standard benchmark for asking-rent direction. Pairs with Apartment List + Zillow ZORI for triangulation.

orgs.name: Freddie Mac Multifamily Research
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Industry-standard for multifamily perm-debt cost forecasts. Freddie + Fannie agency loans are 40-50% of multifamily debt market.

orgs.name: Brookings Metropolitan Policy Program
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Best source for evidence-based land-use + supply policy analysis. Useful for council-presentation framing.

orgs.name: UCLA Lewis Center for Regional Policy Studies
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Curated digest of new academic housing research. Best podcast for staying current on housing-supply academic literature.

orgs.name: Common Sense Institute Colorado
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Local Colorado-focused research with CO-specific supply gap + affordability framing. Alternative to advocacy-org framing.
orgs.integrated_in_coho: Colorado Deep Dive supplementary research + News CO filter (F235)

orgs.name: Up For Growth
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: The methodology behind '4 million unit shortage' national + state framing. Use for compelling supply-gap pitch.
orgs.integrated_in_coho: Landing page deficit growth tile (F226) — broader integration in F235

orgs.name: Urban Institute Housing Finance Policy Center
publications: Housing Finance at a Glance (monthly chartbook)
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Best free source for mortgage + multifamily finance market data + policy commentary. Useful for cap-stack + financing-environment context.

orgs.name: Sightline Institute
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Best source for missing-middle + ADU + zoning-reform policy framing. Limited Colorado focus but methodology travels.

orgs.name: Lincoln Institute of Land Policy
orgs.why_lihtc_devs_care: Authoritative on land economics, property tax, value capture. Useful for soft-funding tool selection context.
